steps.t: Wild wheat and seeds can be found north and east of the Beorninghús. You should collect wheat and seeds for your honey cake.
A mortar and pestle can be found at the Beorninghús. You should crush the wheat and seeds that you have collected.
The mortar and pestle can be found at the Beorninghús. You should add the honey to the mixture you have made.
The oven can be found at the Beorninghús. You should put your cake in the oven.
The oven can be found at the Beorninghús. You should take your cake out of the oven.
A cake stand can be found inside Grimbeorn's lodge. You should present your cake on the stand.
Hállkell can be found at the Beorninghús. You should show your perfect honey cake to Hállkell.
